Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm, Friday 10am-5pm (541) 444-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS THREE RIVERS DENTAL CLINIC COOS BAY DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pediatric and general dental services, including cleanings, fillings, crowns, bridges, dentures, root canals, treatment planning, and extractions. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Enrolled members of federally recognized Indian Tribes Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm (541) 888-6433 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DENTAL LIFELINE NETWORK DONATED DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive dental services to older adults, people with disabilities, and medically fragile individuals through a network of volunteer dentists and dental labs. A volunteer dentist will come up with a treatment plan, with the goal of making sure the patient is pain-free and able to eat properly. Does not provide emergency care. Services may include: -Dental cleanings -Cavity prevention (sealants, fluoride treatments/supplements) -Dental prosthodontics (dentures, bridges, crowns, implants) -Orthodontics -Endodontics -Dental restoration -Periodontics -Oral/maxillofacial surgery -Cosmetic dentistry 1800 15th Street Suite 100 Denver, CO 80202 Eligibility: Veterans and individuals who cannot pay for dental care and who are age 65 and older, have a permanent disability, or are medically compromised.
